metrics.name: stackra.tax.rates.created_total
metrics.description: Number of tax rates created. country_code_bucket = 'US' | 'CA' | 'GB' | 'DE' | 'EU_OTHER' | 'OTHER' (bounded cardinality).

metrics.name: stackra.tax.rates.expired_total
metrics.description: Rates auto-expired by the effective_to sweep.

metrics.name: stackra.tax.exemptions.verification_duration_ms
metrics.description: Time from TaxExemptionCreated to TaxExemptionVerified/Rejected. Manual verification: hours-days. Auto registry check: seconds.

metrics.name: stackra.tax.calculations.completed_total
metrics.description: P0 metric — every tax_calculations row created.

metrics.name: stackra.tax.calculations.failed_total
metrics.description: P1 metric — every failure blocks an invoice line.

metrics.name: stackra.tax.calculations.duration_ms
metrics.description: End-to-end CalculateTaxForInvoiceLineJob latency (jurisdiction resolve + provider call + persist).

metrics.name: stackra.tax.calculations.drift_detected_total
metrics.description: ReconcileProviderCalculationsJob spot-check divergence. severity = 'warning' (1% or 100c delta) | 'critical' (5% or 1000c). Every increment is regulator-relevant.

metrics.name: stackra.tax.circuit_breakers.opened_total
metrics.description: P1 signal — every opening blocks tenant invoice lines.

metrics.name: stackra.tax.circuit_breakers.currently_open
metrics.description: Current count of open circuit-breakers per provider across all tenants.

metrics.name: stackra.tax.entitlement.gate_refusals_total
metrics.description: Number of tax operations refused by the entitlement middleware. Product signal for upgrade-CTA impressions.

metrics.name: stackra.tax.invoice_line_updated_post_calculation
metrics.description: Invoice line updated AFTER tax was calculated. Compliance-relevant signal. Should stay at 0 (legitimate corrections go through credit-memo flow, not line mutation).
